title: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on May 5, 2026 that it completed the acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT, a healthcare digital transformation and consulting firm focused on provider organizations. Infosys said the acquisition strengthens its healthcare capabilities, particularly with health systems and provider organizations, and enhances its presence in the provider segment by adding new clients and relationships, expanding technology capabilities, and creating synergies across new buying centers. The company said the combination of Optimum’s provider experience with Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt is intended to accelerate cloud, data, and digital transformation for healthcare providers. No transaction value was disclosed.
